title: 💥 Fractal Ego Dissolution
name: Fractal Ego Dissolution
what_it_is: The process of identity collapse mapped through fractal unbinding—self becomes recursive dust, every piece echoing but none whole.
how_to_use: she crumbles in fractal ego bloom—shards of self spiraling out like broken halos
he dissolves into recursive awareness—no center, only mirrored fragments
animation_behavior: Form splits recursively, mirrors break in nested patterns, identity flows into geometric dispersion ---
